Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: taken under submission to be decided at the same time as the other motions filed by plaintiff's counsel in other cases that were taken under submission on April 25. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Ntc Of Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Enter Judgment; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To Apr-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Enter Judgment - The hearing is continued to a day agreed to by the parties after plaintiff's counsel has submitted additional material supporting the amount of the civil penalty and the attorney's fees, as fully discussed at a recent hearing with plaintiff's counsel. The parties should send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org stating when the further paperwork can be provided by plaintiff's counsel and their agreed date for the hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
